name: Outreach
what_it_does: Enterprise sales execution platform combining multi-channel outreach sequences, deal management, revenue intelligence, and AI-powered sales coaching into a unified platform for large sales organizations.
use_cases: Managing enterprise-scale SDR outreach sequences across email, phone, and LinkedIn with team-level reporting
Integrating with Salesforce to sync contact, opportunity, and activity data bidirectionally
Analyzing sales call recordings and email performance to identify coaching opportunities via AI
Building revenue forecasting models from pipeline data and engagement signals
Automating sequence enrollment from CRM triggers and external systems via REST API
not_for: Small teams or startups — Outreach is priced for enterprise with contracts typically starting at $100+/user/month
Simple cold email automation where lighter tools (Instantly, Lemlist) are far more cost-effective
Teams that don't have a Salesforce or enterprise CRM — Outreach's value compounds with CRM integration
Self-service or month-to-month usage — annual contracts are standard
best_when: A large enterprise sales organization needs a comprehensive platform managing the full sales execution workflow — sequences, calls, deal inspection, forecasting — with deep Salesforce integration and management visibility.
avoid_when: You're a small team, need month-to-month pricing, or only need cold email sequences without the full enterprise sales stack.

auth.notes: OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow with defined scopes per resource (prospects, sequences, accounts, etc.). Access tokens expire and require refresh token rotation. Client credentials must be registered through Outreach's developer portal. Significantly more complex auth setup than competitors but provides proper scope control.

paid_tiers.name: Enterprise
paid_tiers.notes: Advanced AI, custom integrations, dedicated CSM

pricing.notes: Annual contracts standard — no public self-serve pricing. Pricing negotiated through sales. Total cost varies heavily by seat count and contract terms. Implementation fees may apply for enterprise deployments.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: JSON API spec compliance means errors follow a consistent structure with errors array containing status, title, and detail fields. Error messages are more structured than most sales engagement tools but documentation for specific error codes is incomplete.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Resource creation does not support idempotency keys. However, prospects can be looked up by email before creation to prevent duplicates. Sequence enrollments check for existing active enrollment before adding, reducing duplicate risk.
known_agent_gotchas: OAuth 2.0 setup requires application registration through Outreach developer portal — significantly higher setup complexity than API key competitors
Access tokens expire after 2 hours — agents must implement token refresh logic or use short-lived token handling carefully
API follows JSON API spec (jsonapi.org) — payload structure is more verbose than typical REST APIs; agents expecting standard JSON structures will need adapters
Rate limits are per OAuth application, not per user — shared applications across multiple agents can exhaust limits quickly
Sequence enrollment requires the prospect to not be in an active sequence — must check enrollment status before attempting to enroll
Salesforce sync is bidirectional but has sync delays — agents reading from Outreach immediately after a Salesforce change may see stale data
Webhooks require HTTPS endpoint verification challenge before activation
Some advanced features (revenue intelligence, call AI) are not available via API — UI-only features

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. OAuth 2.0 with scopes is the strongest auth model in this category — significantly better than API-key-only competitors. Token expiration enforces rotation. SOC 2 Type II certified. GDPR DPA and EU data residency available. Webhook payloads signed with HMAC for verification. Application registration through developer portal provides accountability layer.
